what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon that combines a clock face with a lower hand-like or support shape.
observations: Uses an inline SVG root with viewBox 0 0 24 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
Draws the icon with one lower path, one circular clock face, and one path for clock hands.
standouts: The clock face is centered at 11,8 with radius 5.
The lower shape spans from x=3 to x=19 and closes at y=21.
conventions: Follows a compact icon SVG pattern with inline geometry and inherited stroke color.
Uses path and circle primitives rather than embedded raster content.
Omits explicit width and height, relying on viewBox scaling.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present for standalone accessibility metadata.
notes: A compact reusable SVG icon for a hand-clock concept using currentColor stroke styling.
questions: Is the lower shape intended to represent a hand, a person bust, or a generic support base?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename's hand-clock purpose is consistent with the visible clock face and lower hand-like support form.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a scalable design-system icon for a time-related interaction or status involving a hand/support metaphor.
novelty: The clock face is paired with a simplified lower support shape rather than presented as a standalone clock.
contribution: Contributes a themeable, stroke-based time/support icon geometry that a fused system could keep as an asset-level representation of a hand-clock concept.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon showing a clock face above a lower hand-like support shape.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for a reusable design-system icon representing a hand-clock or supported-time concept.
